Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class AppAnalyticsQueryRequest

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.AppAnalyticsQueryRequest
public class AppAnalyticsQueryRequest extends SObject

Java class for AppAnalyticsQueryRequest complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="AppAnalyticsQueryRequest">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AvailableSince" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DataType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DownloadExpirationTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DownloadSize" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}long" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DownloadUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EndTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ErrorMessage" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FileCompression" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FileType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastReferencedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastViewedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OrganizationIds" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PackageIds" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="QuerySubmittedTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RequestState" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StartTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserRecordAccess" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserRecordAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
